description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of white and gray stone exterior walls. The front features a covered carport with two vehicles, potted plants, and large windows. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool, green lawn, and several lounge chairs, all enclosed by a stone wall. The upper floor includes multiple rooms with visible interior details such as beds and furniture, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The house has several wooden doors and a shaded patio area facing the pool. Landscaping includes small trees and shrubs, adding to the contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, stone and white walls, a carport, and a backyard pool with lounge area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with two cars, potted plants, and large windows on the upper and lower floors.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a shaded patio area.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, green lawn, stone wall enclosure, and the main patio entry to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, a single parked car, and the side wall with windows and doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple wooden door under a covered carport, flanked by potted plants and large windows, with no steps or ornate decorations.
